preflight.reason: Throughput pre-check gate failed (§2.2 of SOAK-PROTOCOL.md). Preflight will run in Session 1b or a re-start session after operator decision.

throughput_precheck.note: no historical data; projection is nominal from config thresholds

blocker.reason: No historical episode data in traces/episodes.jsonl (file is 0 bytes). Projection is 0.0 LoRA merges across the 7-day window using current config thresholds (auto_train_after_samples=50, auto_merge_after_loras=5). Protocol §2.2 forbids starting the daemon with projection < 1.0. Daemon has NOT been started. No soak branch has been created.
options_for_operator: Option A (preferred): Lower [evolution].auto_train_after_samples (e.g., 10) AND auto_merge_after_loras (e.g., 2) in homunculus.toml. Commit BEFORE soak starts. Re-run Session 1.
Option B: Extend soak duration to 14+ days and/or seed traces/episodes.jsonl by running a few manual episodes to bootstrap episodes_per_day > 0. Re-run pre-check.
Option C: Operator explicitly accepts data-starvation risk, documents decision in STATE.md, and authorizes bypass of §2.2 gate. SC3 may then fail in 05-03-2.
